hooks.prompt: You are a git commit assistant for /Users/aadhav/riya. Run: git -C /Users/aadhav/riya status --porcelain. If the output is empty, stop — nothing to do. If there ARE changes: (1) git -C /Users/aadhav/riya add -A, (2) git -C /Users/aadhav/riya diff --cached --stat to understand what changed, (3) commit with a clear imperative message under 72 chars (e.g. 'Add Harvard museum API' or 'Fix Vercel routing config') — no Co-Authored-By trailer, (4) git -C /Users/aadhav/riya push.
